`r if (has_reference) "This is a [NeoIPC Surveillance](https://neoipc.org/surveillance/)<!-- --> analysis of infection rates in your neonatal department, presented alongside reference data from the NeoIPC Surveillance network to support benchmarking and identification of areas for further review." else "This is a [NeoIPC Surveillance](https://neoipc.org/surveillance/)<!-- --> analysis of infection rates in your neonatal department. This report does not include reference data for benchmarking. It can be used to monitor your department's infection rates over time and to establish a local baseline. For reference data from the NeoIPC Surveillance network, see the Reference Report published at <https://neoipc.org/surveillance/resources/>."`

The following summary presents key surveillance metrics for this report:
